title: Moderation Update: Abuse Queue Cleared
body:
Triaged 6 reports. Actions taken:
• Banned spam_wave_42 (phishing links across 6 channels)
• Banned toxic_runner (targeted harassment of newcomers)
• Warned bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automated replies)
• Skipped 2 reports involving trusted members (false positives)
• 1 low-priority formatting issue remains open

Queue processed. Community safety maintained.
